news.headline: The Killing Of Haiti’s President Heads to a U.S. Court. What to Know.

news.headline: 'I just want to be able to sleep': Attacks in Iran rock cities and cut power
news.summary: Iranians in Tehran and Karaj tell the BBC they are exhausted and struggling to sleep after 10 days of Israeli and US attacks.

news.headline: Australia Grants Humanitarian Visas to 5 Members of Iranian Women’s Soccer Team
news.summary: Concern for the safety of the players had grown after Iranian state media criticized them for not singing the national anthem at a game in Australia.
